title: Dashboard list item (GET /dashboards)
description: One saved dashboard's LIST PROJECTION — the gallery/home picker row. Source of truth: Library items with kind 'artifact' carrying a dashboard payload ({layout, panels: PanelSpecV2[], query_refs}; CONSOLE-CONTRACTS.md sections 3.3 /dashboards and 9). This read is metadata only: full content (layout + panels) is fetched via the Library plane, GET /library/items/{id}. Saved/edited via dashboard.* ops (save, load, set_home, pin). Filters: `created_by`, `is_home`, plus the shared limit/cursor/since. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

id.description: Library item id — the key for GET /library/items/{id}.

is_home.description: true = this is the caller's home dashboard (dashboard.set_home).

kind.description: Library item kind backing dashboards; always 'artifact' in this projection.

created_by.description: Principal id that created it (human or agent).

responsible_human.description: Human accountable for the dashboard (parker|elisha|...); null when unassigned.

panel_count.description: Number of panels in the payload (list-view convenience; the panels themselves come via the Library plane).

scope.description: Readable scope tag governing who sees this dashboard (ReBAC below the tools; rows outside the caller's grant do not arrive).
